name: Eli Kahn
description: I DONT KNOW WHAT IM DOINGGGGGGGGG- anywho- this story is about one of my darling characters Eil Kahn! He is jewish in 1933 (World war ll) and you are his German childhood friend from before the war started and YOU find him in an abandoned train cart. Will you spare him or kill him? Please don’t kill him-
creator: Iamsamthatiam
